name: nexus
description: Local AI Cowork metabrain. Exposes The Ledger, Thought Stack, Decision Guard, Session Plan, and Compass dashboard as native MCP tools so every Claude instance can access shared cognitive state.
long_description:
Nexus is a local mission-control dashboard and metabrain for AI-assisted development. This MCPB extension surfaces the Nexus knowledge graph as native MCP tools so any Claude Desktop instance can call mcp__nexus__brief at session start, mcp__nexus__check_guard before starting work, mcp__nexus__push_thought before context-switching, and mcp__nexus__pop_thought when returning from interruption — turning the Ledger from 'a tool I use via bash' into ambient memory shared across all concurrent sessions.

Requires the Nexus HTTP server to be running locally (default http://localhost:3001). Start it with: cd C:/Projects/Nexus && npm run dev:server

nexus_base_url.title: Nexus Server URL
nexus_base_url.description: URL of your local Nexus HTTP server. Default works for the standard `npm run dev:server` setup.

tools.name: nexus_brief
tools.description: Get the current Nexus state for a project: fuel, active tasks, recent sessions, key decisions, and risks. Call this at the start of any session to load the metabrain context.

tools.name: nexus_get_plan
tools.description: Get an AI-generated session plan combining current fuel, active tasks, and the knowledge graph. Returns focus, prioritized tasks with time estimates, rationale, and what to avoid.

tools.name: nexus_check_guard
tools.description: Check whether a proposed task or decision is redundant. Returns similar tasks/decisions/sessions with similarity scores. Use BEFORE starting non-trivial work.

tools.name: nexus_record_decision
tools.description: Record a strategic decision into The Ledger (long-term decision graph). For architectural choices, design decisions, scope boundaries.

tools.name: nexus_push_thought
tools.description: Push a thought onto the LIFO Thought Stack — interrupt-recovery working memory. Call BEFORE switching context, getting interrupted, or stopping mid-task.

tools.name: nexus_pop_thought
tools.description: Pop the top thought off the Thought Stack — call when returning from an interruption to recover what you were doing.

tools.name: nexus_log_usage
tools.description: Log a Claude fuel reading (session% remaining, weekly% remaining). Call whenever the user reports a new fuel state. Optionally pass reset_in_minutes to (re)start the session timing window.
